First Week of Ibn Haldun Academy Spring Seminars Was Completed With Highly Participation

03.05.2023

The first week’s sessions of Ibn Haldun Academy Spring Seminars, which was organized under the theme of "Aesthetics", were held on Saturday, April 29 at our Kulliye with highly participation, as well as online via Zoom.

The program started with Prof. Dr. Alev Erkilet's seminar titled "City and Aesthetics". It continued with Dr. Vahdettin Işık's seminar titled "Living in the Islamic City as an Aesthetic Life Space". After the lunch break, Dr. Hasan Ramazan Yılmaz gave a seminar titled “Aesthetic Origins of Cinema, Past and Present”.

The program, which started with the first sessions of our scholars’ seminars, continued with the conference of Prof. Dr. İbrahim Kalın, "Aesthetics in the Age of Plastic: Is There a Way Out?". After the conference, the first week program of Ibn Haldun Academy Spring Seminars was completed.
